bead.title: runs: re-queue UI (try, run) + 'Start worker from this drain' (work)
bead.description: Re-queue button on layer=try and layer=run rows. For layer=work, a 'Start worker from this drain' action prefilling the original queue inputs (codex-pushed; user confirmed).
bead.acceptance: 1. Re-queue button visible on try and run rows. 2. Modal prefilled with original config; idempotency key generated client-side. 3. work-layer 'Start worker' action prefilled with original drain config.
